Service layer¶

faceapp_services package¶

Service-layer package for CLI, API, and worker orchestration.

faceapp_services.manager¶

faceapp_services.manager.runworkers_command(args)¶

Run worker tasks once or in watch mode and print JSON results.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.manager.runserver_command(args)¶

Start the FastAPI application with uvicorn.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.manager.runall_command(args)¶

Start API server and workers concurrently as separate processes.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.manager.ingest_command(args)¶

Run ingestion immediately for one file or in loop mode for a folder.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.manager.search_command(args)¶

Search matches for one query file or loop over a query folder.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.manager.main()¶

CLI entry point for the faceapp command.

Return type:

int

faceapp_services.api.main¶

faceapp_services.api.main.health()¶

Simple health endpoint for local service checks.

Return type:

dict

async faceapp_services.api.main.extract_image(image=fastapi.File, embedding_models=fastapi.Form, features=fastapi.Form, face_detector=fastapi.Form, project_id=fastapi.Form)¶

Upload one image and run the unit extraction worker task.

Parameters:

  • image (fastapi.UploadFile)

  • embedding_models (List[str])

  • features (List[str])

  • face_detector (str)

  • project_id (str | None)

Return type:

WorkerResult

async faceapp_services.api.main.extract_folder(files=fastapi.File, embedding_models=fastapi.Form, features=fastapi.Form, face_detector=fastapi.Form, project_id=fastapi.Form)¶

Upload many images and run the batch extraction worker task.

Parameters:

  • files (List[fastapi.UploadFile])

  • embedding_models (List[str])

  • features (List[str])

  • face_detector (str)

  • project_id (str | None)

Return type:

WorkerResult

faceapp_services.workers¶

Worker package public exports.

This package provides task contracts, dispatching, and a local in-memory worker runner that mimics serverless invocation style.

class faceapp_services.workers.TaskEnvelope(*, id, type, payload, source=None)¶

Bases: BaseModel

Task wrapper consumed by the worker dispatcher.

Parameters:

  • id (str)

  • type (TaskType)

  • payload (ExtractionUnitPayload | ExtractionBatchPayload)

  • source (str | None)

id: str¶
type: TaskType¶
payload: TaskPayload¶
source: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class faceapp_services.workers.TaskType(value)¶

Bases: str, Enum

Supported worker task kinds.

EXTRACT_UNIT = 'extract.unit'¶
EXTRACT_BATCH = 'extract.batch'¶
class faceapp_services.workers.WorkerResult(*, task_id, task_type, status, data=None, error=None)¶

Bases: BaseModel

Standardized worker response for success and error outcomes.

Parameters:

  • task_id (str)

  • task_type (TaskType)

  • status (Literal['success', 'error'])

  • data (Any)

  • error (str | None)

task_id: str¶
task_type: TaskType¶
status: Literal['success', 'error']¶
data: Any¶
error: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

faceapp_services.workers.contracts¶

class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.TaskType(value)¶

Bases: str, Enum

Supported worker task kinds.

EXTRACT_UNIT = 'extract.unit'¶
EXTRACT_BATCH = 'extract.batch'¶
class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.ExtractionBasePayload(*, embedding_models, features, face_detector='mtcnn', project_id=None)¶

Bases: BaseModel

Common extraction settings shared by unit and batch tasks.

Parameters:

  • embedding_models (List[str])

  • features (List[str])

  • face_detector (str)

  • project_id (str | None)

embedding_models: List[str]¶
features: List[str]¶
face_detector: str¶
project_id: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.ExtractionUnitPayload(*, embedding_models, features, face_detector='mtcnn', project_id=None, path)¶

Bases: ExtractionBasePayload

Payload for extracting faces from one image path.

Parameters:

  • embedding_models (List[str])

  • features (List[str])

  • face_detector (str)

  • project_id (str | None)

  • path (str)

path: str¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.ExtractionBatchPayload(*, embedding_models, features, face_detector='mtcnn', project_id=None, paths=<factory>)¶

Bases: ExtractionBasePayload

Payload for extracting faces from multiple image paths.

Parameters:

  • embedding_models (List[str])

  • features (List[str])

  • face_detector (str)

  • project_id (str | None)

  • paths (List[str])

paths: List[str]¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.TaskEnvelope(*, id, type, payload, source=None)¶

Bases: BaseModel

Task wrapper consumed by the worker dispatcher.

Parameters:

  • id (str)

  • type (TaskType)

  • payload (ExtractionUnitPayload | ExtractionBatchPayload)

  • source (str | None)

id: str¶
type: TaskType¶
payload: TaskPayload¶
source: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class faceapp_services.workers.contracts.WorkerResult(*, task_id, task_type, status, data=None, error=None)¶

Bases: BaseModel

Standardized worker response for success and error outcomes.

Parameters:

  • task_id (str)

  • task_type (TaskType)

  • status (Literal['success', 'error'])

  • data (Any)

  • error (str | None)

task_id: str¶
task_type: TaskType¶
status: Literal['success', 'error']¶
data: Any¶
error: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

faceapp_services.workers.dispatcher¶

class faceapp_services.workers.dispatcher.WorkerDispatcher¶

Bases: object

Dispatches typed worker tasks to extraction handlers.

async dispatch(task)¶

Execute a task envelope.

Returns normalized success/error output in WorkerResult.

Parameters:

task (TaskEnvelope)

Return type:

WorkerResult

faceapp_services.workers.extraction¶

class faceapp_services.workers.extraction.ExtractionTaskHandler¶

Bases: object

Executes extraction and indexing tasks using configured strategies.

async handle_unit(payload)¶

Run extraction and indexing for one image path.

Parameters:

payload (ExtractionUnitPayload)

Return type:

dict

async handle_batch(payload)¶

Run extraction and indexing sequentially for each path in batch.

Parameters:

payload (ExtractionBatchPayload)

Return type:

list[dict]

faceapp_services.workers.local_runner¶

class faceapp_services.workers.local_runner.LocalServerlessWorker¶

Bases: object

In-memory worker runner that mimics serverless invocation: one task envelope in, one result out.

enqueue(task)¶

Push one task envelope into the worker queue.

Parameters:

task (TaskEnvelope)

Return type:

None

enqueue_many(tasks)¶

Push multiple task envelopes into the worker queue.

Parameters:

tasks (Iterable[TaskEnvelope])

Return type:

None

async run_once()¶

Process a single queued task and return its result.

Return type:

WorkerResult | None

async run_all()¶

Process all queued tasks until the queue is empty.

Return type:

List[WorkerResult]

run_all_sync()¶

Synchronous wrapper around run_all for CLI/local scripts.

Return type:

List[WorkerResult]

faceapp_services.workers.multiprocess_runner¶

class faceapp_services.workers.multiprocess_runner.MultiprocessQdrantWorkerRunner(num_workers=2)¶

Bases: object

Run many worker processes.

Each process consumes tasks and executes configured worker strategies.

Parameters:

num_workers (int)

run(tasks)¶

Execute all tasks across multiple worker processes.

Parameters:

tasks (Iterable[TaskEnvelope])

Return type:

list[WorkerResult]

faceapp_services.workers.queue¶

class faceapp_services.workers.queue.TaskQueue(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Protocol

Queue interface for enqueue/dequeue operations.

enqueue(task)¶
Parameters:

task (TaskEnvelope)

Return type:

None

dequeue(timeout_seconds=5)¶
Parameters:

timeout_seconds (int)

Return type:

TaskEnvelope | None

class faceapp_services.workers.queue.RedisTaskQueue(url, queue_name='faceapp:tasks')¶

Bases: object

Redis list-backed queue implementation.

Parameters:

  • url (str)

  • queue_name (str)

enqueue(task)¶

Push one task envelope to the queue.

Parameters:

task (TaskEnvelope)

Return type:

None

dequeue(timeout_seconds=5)¶

Pop one task envelope from the queue, blocking for timeout.

Parameters:

timeout_seconds (int)

Return type:

TaskEnvelope | None

faceapp_services.workers.queue.build_task_queue(backend, url, queue_name)¶

Build a queue instance for the selected backend.

Parameters:

  • backend (str)

  • url (str)

  • queue_name (str)

Return type:

TaskQueue

faceapp_services.workers.result_store¶

class faceapp_services.workers.result_store.QdrantWorkerResultStore(url=None, api_key=None, path=None, collection_name='faceapp_worker_results', vector_size=4)¶

Bases: object

Stores worker task results as payload documents in Qdrant.

Parameters:

  • url (Optional[str])

  • api_key (Optional[str])

  • path (Optional[str])

  • collection_name (str)

  • vector_size (int)

write_result(result, worker_id)¶

Persist one worker result as a payload document in Qdrant.

Parameters:

  • result (WorkerResult)

  • worker_id (str)

Return type:

str

faceapp_services.workers.strategies¶

class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.ExtractionStrategy(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Protocol

Creates extraction pipelines.

build_pipeline()¶
Return type:

Pipeline

class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.IndexingStrategy(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Protocol

Creates indexing pipelines.

build_pipeline()¶
Return type:

Pipeline

class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.LocalExtractionStrategy¶

Bases: object

Default extraction strategy using local image processing.

build_pipeline()¶
Return type:

Pipeline

class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.QdrantIndexingStrategy¶

Bases: object

Default indexing strategy using Qdrant vector store pipeline.

build_pipeline()¶
Return type:

Pipeline

class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.ResolvedWorkerStrategies(extraction, indexing, index_config)¶

Bases: object

Resolved strategy instances and computed indexing config.

Parameters:

  • extraction (ExtractionStrategy)

  • indexing (IndexingStrategy)

  • index_config (dict[str, Any])

extraction: ExtractionStrategy¶
indexing: IndexingStrategy¶
index_config: dict[str, Any]¶
class faceapp_services.workers.strategies.WorkerStrategyResolver(config_dir=None)¶

Bases: object

Resolves worker strategies from YAML config files.

Parameters:

config_dir (str | None)

resolve(project_id=None)¶

Resolve extraction/indexing strategies and index config.

Parameters:

project_id (str | None)

Return type:

ResolvedWorkerStrategies

faceapp
